title: High stakes battle in Balrampur as rival candidates file affidavits
snippet_text: The election filing process completed today in Balrampur. Multi-millionaire candidates and independent leaders enter the fray, making the contest highly unpredictable.

title: Political rally in Balrampur draws massive crowds ahead of voting day
snippet_text: Top party leaders addressed a massive rally in Balrampur promising job creations, free electricity, and specialized sub-plans for rural developmental bounds.
